MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court does not "deem" amended pleadings filed and served. Plaintiff must file and serve the amended pleading after the motion is granted. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.)
